description:
Summer Operating Area: USA - New England
Winter Operating Area: Bahamas

CHARTER IN THE BAHAMAS ABOARD CHANSON

Welcome aboard CHANSON, where you and your loved ones can relax in unrivaled luxury and style. CHANSON’s spacious layout rivals that of a 140-foot yacht, offering an array of settings for both gathering and relaxation. On the aft deck, enjoy shaded al fresco dining, while the main salon and formal dining areas invite you into a light, airy space perfect for bringing everyone together. Above, the sky lounge offers a chic bar and entertainment space, leading out to the sundeck complete with cozy seating and even a golf putting green.

Venture up to the flybridge, where you’ll find an inviting Jacuzzi with built-in bar stools, a sun lounge, and a Bimini top, perfect for both sun-soaked and shaded relaxation. CHANSON accommodates up to 8 guests across 4 well-appointed staterooms. The on-deck VIP stateroom features large windows, a king bed, and an en-suite bath with shower. The full-beam master suite includes a king bed and private his-and-hers bathrooms, with a shower in one and a Jacuzzi in the other. Two additional guest cabins, each with spacious en-suite bathrooms, complete the accommodations—one with a full and twin bed, and the other with two twin beds.

Beyond her elegant interior, CHANSON boasts an impressive range of water toys, including wave runners, Brownies third lung, and a fully rigged center console tender for endless adventure. With an experienced, energetic crew of six dedicated to providing an exceptional charter experience, CHANSON is your luxurious home on the water, ready to exceed your every expectation.

blueprint.name: CHANSON
tenders: 32’ Midnight fully equipped for deep sea fishing

crew.name: Fish Corertes
crew.bio:
Nationality: South African

Originally from the shores of Michigan, Captain Spence has spent the past 17 years exploring the vibrant blue waters of the Caribbean and Bahamas. Starting as a first mate right
after graduation, he rose quickly through the ranks, captaining his first yacht at just 24. Known for his deep local knowledge of the Caribbean, Bahamas, Florida Keys, and coastlines, Captain Spence is dedicated to creating extraordinary experiences, diving with sharks, enjoying a private beach picnic, or unwinding with a sunset in a secluded cove. An engaging guide with a knack for finding hidden gems, Captain Spence goes above and beyond to ensure each charter is memorable for guests and crew alike

crew.name: Melina Leblanc
crew.bio:
Nationality: Canadian

Melina is a French Canadian originally from Montreal, Canada, who found her true calling on the stunning island of Barbados. It was here that her passion for the ocean flourished and her fascination with the Yachting Industry began to take shape. Eager to deepen her understanding, Melina became maritime certified and subsequently moved to Fort Lauderdale. There, she secured her first position on a 52M superyacht, marking the beginning of an exciting journey in the industry. With eight years of experience across both private and charter yachts, Melina brings a wealth of knowledge to the interior team, ensuring that each guest’s needs are expertly met. Her warm, welcoming, and bubbly personality creates a comforting atmosphere that makes every guest feel at home. In her free time, she enjoys traveling and cherishing moments with her husband and their beloved cat.

crew.name: Daniel Hoenig
crew.bio:
Nationality: Australia

With over 20 years of global experience, Daniel is a seasoned and dynamic chef specializing in yacht, estate, private island, and resort settings. His culinary style is creative, fresh, and vibrant—always evolving and made entirely from scratch.
Daniel's expertise spans Modern Australian, Eastern European, Kosher, Mediterranean, and Asian fusion cuisine. He is highly adept at catering to a wide range of dietary preferences and restrictions with ease and confidence. Before joining the yachting world, Daniel served as Head Chef at a renowned seafood restaurant on the Elwood Beach waterfront, which was awarded #1 by the Australian Good Food Guide Magazine in Melbourne. Outside the galley, Daniel is an adventurer at heart, with passions for mountain climbing, skiing, working out, and exploring new destinations.

crew.name: Zander Everson Tamayo
crew.bio:
Nationality: African

Zander hails from Walvis Bay, Namibia—a unique desert town nestled along the coast. His deep-rooted passion for the ocean and adventurous spirit steered him toward the Yachting Industry. Although he's relatively new to this field, Zander is a fast learner with an enthusiastic drive for personal and professional growth. He thrives on various water-related activities, with fishing standing out as a favorite pastime. On deck, Zander takes great pride in tasks like painting, polishing, and varnishing, always ensuring a polished finish. Committed to delivering exceptional experiences, he is dedicated to making every guest’s time onboard truly memorable.

In his spare time, George loves staying active—whether he’s playing basketball, jogging, biking, or relaxing on the beach. His enthusiasm and attention to detail make him a valuable part of the CHANSON team.

crew.name: Janette Ruman
crew.bio:
Nationality: Polish

Janette, originally from Poland and Ukraine, has spent the past few years in Spain, where her proximity to the sea sparked a deep passion for yachting. With extensive experience in the hospitality industry both ashore and onboard, Janette is committed to providing guests with attentive, professional care, always delivered with a warm and welcoming smile. Beyond her role on the yacht, Janette has a keen interest in psychology, health, and wellness. During her time off, she loves staying active, whether it’s paddle boarding, beach outings, or exploring new ways to maintain a healthy lifestyle. Her dedication to hospitality and enthusiasm for a vibrant, balanced life make her an invaluable addition to your experience aboard

crew.name: Mike Partin
crew.bio:
Nationality: USA

Mike hails from Norfolk, Virginia, and embodies the spirit of an outdoor enthusiast. His passion for fishing and the great outdoors naturally guided him to the world of sailing, where he navigated his 
way up to working on yachts. With a strong background in engineering, Mike excels at ensuring that every vessel is meticulously maintained and in top condition. Guests can relax with confidence, 
knowing that their safety is in expert hands whenever Mike is on board..
